title: Is it possible to query data through an API on an account that has HIPAA Compliance turned on?
excerpt: I’m using an API to retrieve data from my monday board to a 3rd party application. Would it be possible to continue doing this if I activate HIPAA Compliance on my account?

posts.author: alberkko (Albert Kokoshi)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using an API to retrieve data from my monday board to a 3rd party application. Would it be possible to continue doing this if I activate HIPAA Compliance on my account?
